tasks.title: Count active users
tasks.description: Return the number of records in users where active is truthy.

tasks.title: Count inactive users
tasks.description: Return the number of records in users where active is falsy.

tasks.title: Find the city with the most active users
tasks.description: Filter to active users, group them by city, count each group, and return the city name with the highest count.

tasks.title: Pack active and inactive counts
tasks.description: Return a record with two keys: active and inactive. active is the count of active users, inactive is the count of inactive users.

tasks.title: Rewind to the filtered active users and count them
tasks.description: Conceptually keep only active users, do some extra work, then return to the filtered active list and return its length.

tasks.title: Return the top scorer name
tasks.description: Return the name of the user with the highest score.

tasks.title: Return the first two active names alphabetically
tasks.description: Filter to active users, sort them by name ascending, take the first two records, and return the list of names.

tasks.title: Unique active cities
tasks.description: Return a sorted list of unique city names for active users.

tasks.title: Normalize all emails
tasks.description: Return the list of user email values after trimming surrounding whitespace and converting to lowercase.

tasks.title: Collect unique tags
tasks.description: Extract every tags list from users, flatten once, remove duplicates while preserving first-seen order, then sort ascending.

tasks.title: Split and trim text
tasks.description: Take the text input, split by comma, trim each piece, and return the resulting list.

tasks.title: Join words
tasks.description: Join the words input with the separator '|'.

tasks.title: Flatten a matrix
tasks.description: Flatten the matrix input by one level and return the flattened list.

tasks.title: Count paid orders
tasks.description: Return the number of order records where paid is truthy.

tasks.title: Find the country with the most paid orders
tasks.description: Filter to paid orders, group them by country, count the groups, and return the country with the highest count.

tasks.title: Count items inside paid orders
tasks.description: Filter to paid orders, extract the items field from each record, flatten once, and return the total number of resulting items.

tasks.title: Append active and inactive user names
tasks.description: Return a single list formed by active user names first and inactive user names second, each preserving original order.

tasks.title: Zip active and inactive user names
tasks.description: Take the first three active user names and the first three inactive user names, then return them zipped as a list of two-item lists.

tasks.title: Choose active or inactive count by flag
tasks.description: If flag is true, return the number of active users. If flag is false, return the number of inactive users.

tasks.title: Build a nested report
tasks.description: Return a record with stats and names. stats is a record with active and inactive user counts. names is the first three user names in original order.

tasks.title: Sorted active scores
tasks.description: Filter to active users, extract score, sort ascending, and return the resulting list.

tasks.title: Join active user names
tasks.description: Filter to active users, extract name, and join the names with the separator '|'.

tasks.title: Highest total order id
tasks.description: Return the id of the order with the highest total.

tasks.title: First two paid order ids
tasks.description: Filter to paid orders, extract id, take the first two, and return them as a list.

tasks.title: Unique paid countries
tasks.description: Filter to paid orders, extract country, remove duplicates, sort ascending, and return the resulting list.

tasks.title: Choose active or inactive names by flag
tasks.description: If flag is true, return the first three active user names. If flag is false, return the first three inactive user names.

tasks.title: Sorted profile keys
tasks.description: Return the keys of the profile record sorted ascending.

tasks.title: Profile value count
tasks.description: Return the number of values stored in the profile record.

tasks.title: Lower, trim, and join text parts
tasks.description: Take the text input, convert it to lowercase, split by comma, trim each piece, and join the pieces with '|'.

tasks.title: Flatten matrix and count length
tasks.description: Flatten the matrix input by one level and return the length of the flattened list.

tasks.title: Unique tags in first-seen order
tasks.description: Extract every tags list from users, flatten once, remove duplicates while preserving first-seen order, and return the resulting list.

tasks.title: Zip active names and normalized emails
tasks.description: Filter to active users, take the first three names and the first three normalized email values from the same filtered list, and return them zipped as a list of two-item lists.

tasks.title: Join sorted profile keys
tasks.description: Return the keys of the profile record sorted ascending and joined with ','.

tasks.title: Cities in first-seen order
tasks.description: Extract the city field from users, remove duplicates while preserving first-seen order, and return the resulting list.

tasks.title: Pack paid and unpaid order counts
tasks.description: Return a record with two keys: paid and unpaid. paid is the count of paid orders and unpaid is the count of unpaid orders.

tasks.title: Pack top active city with paid order count
tasks.description: Return a record with two keys: top_city and paid_count. top_city is the city with the most active users. paid_count is the number of paid orders.

tasks.title: Build a cross-input dashboard
tasks.description: Return a record with two nested records: users and orders. users contains active and inactive user counts. orders contains paid and unpaid order counts.

tasks.title: Choose active cities or paid countries by flag
tasks.description: If flag is true, return the sorted unique active user cities. If flag is false, return the sorted unique paid order countries.

tasks.title: Zip active names with paid order ids
tasks.description: Take the first three active user names and the first three paid order ids, then return them zipped as a list of two-item lists.

tasks.title: Build a rich multi-input report
tasks.description: Return a record with two nested records: meta and stats. meta contains sorted profile keys under key names and cleaned text under key clean_text. stats contains active user count and paid order count.

tasks.title: Pack top user and top order
tasks.description: Return a record with two nested records: top_user and top_order. top_user contains the highest scoring user's name and score. top_order contains the highest total order id and total.

tasks.title: Combine cleaned text, profile keys, and paid ids
tasks.description: Return a record with three keys: clean_text, profile_keys, and paid_ids. clean_text is the lowercase comma-split trimmed text joined with '|'. profile_keys is the sorted list of profile keys. paid_ids is the first three paid order ids.

tasks.title: Top active team
tasks.description: Filter to active users, group them by team, count each group, and return the team with the highest count.

tasks.title: Top user summary
tasks.description: Return a record with two keys: name and city. Both values come from the user with the highest score.

tasks.title: Top order summary
tasks.description: Return a record with two keys: id and total. Both values come from the order with the highest total.

tasks.title: Profile keys with order stats
tasks.description: Return a record with three keys: profile_keys, paid_count, and unpaid_count. profile_keys is the sorted list of profile keys.

tasks.title: Zip active names and cities
tasks.description: Filter to active users, take the first three names and first three city values from the same filtered list, and return them zipped as a list of two-item lists.

tasks.title: Pack top active team with top paid country
tasks.description: Return a record with two keys: team and country. team is the team with the most active users. country is the country with the most paid orders.

tasks.title: Choose user or order count by flag
tasks.description: If flag is true, return the active user count. If flag is false, return the paid order count.

tasks.title: Build a light multi-source report
tasks.description: Return a record with three keys: top_city, clean_text, and paid_ids. top_city is the city with the most active users. clean_text is the lowercase comma-split trimmed text joined with '|'. paid_ids is the first three paid order ids.

tasks.title: Build a double dashboard
tasks.description: Return a record with two nested records: users and orders. users contains top_city and top_team for active users. orders contains top_country and paid_count for paid orders.

tasks.title: Zip names with ids after filtering different sources
tasks.description: Take the first three active user names and the first three paid order ids, zip them, and return a record with two keys: pairs and clean_text. pairs is the zipped list and clean_text is the lowercase comma-split trimmed text joined with '|'.

tasks.title: Build a full mega dashboard
tasks.description: Return a record with three nested records: users, orders, and meta. users contains counts, top, and pairs. orders contains counts, top, and pairs. meta contains sorted profile keys and cleaned text.

tasks.title: Choose a deep report by flag
tasks.description: If flag is true, return a nested user report with counts and top. If flag is false, return a nested order report with counts and top.

tasks.title: Pack top user and top order summaries
tasks.description: Return a record with two nested records: user and order. user contains name, city, and score from the highest scoring user. order contains id, country, and total from the highest total order.

tasks.title: Build a zip-heavy cross-source dashboard
tasks.description: Return a record with user_pairs, order_pairs, and stats. user_pairs zips the first three active names with normalized emails. order_pairs zips the first three paid order ids with countries. stats contains active and paid counts.

tasks.title: Build a full meta dashboard
tasks.description: Return a record with clean_text, profile_keys, top_city, top_country, and active_names. active_names is the first three active names.

tasks.title: Build an ultra multi dashboard
tasks.description: Return a record with users, orders, and meta. users contains counts, top, and lists. orders contains counts, top, and lists. meta contains sorted profile keys and cleaned text.

tasks.title: Build a report of reports
tasks.description: Return a record with primary and secondary. primary contains nested users and orders summaries. secondary contains pairs and meta.

tasks.title: Build a top bundle with pairs
tasks.description: Return a record with tops, pairs, and meta. tops contains top user and top order summaries. pairs contains user_pairs and order_pairs. meta contains top_city and top_country.

tasks.title: Build a meta status top report
tasks.description: Return a record with meta, status, and top. meta contains cleaned text and sorted profile keys. status contains nested user and order counts. top contains top_city and top_country.

tasks.title: Choose meta or stats by flag
tasks.description: If flag is true, return a meta record with cleaned text and sorted profile keys. If flag is false, return a stats record with active and paid counts.

tasks.title: Build a cross pair and top report
tasks.description: Return a record with pairs, top, and counts. pairs zips active names with paid order ids. top contains top_city and top_country. counts contains active and paid totals.

tasks.title: Build a brutal quad dashboard
tasks.description: Return a record with counts, tops, lists, and meta. counts contains nested user and order counts. tops contains nested top city, top team, top country, and top order id. lists contains active_names, paid_ids, and profile_keys. meta contains cleaned text.

tasks.title: Choose an ultra dashboard by flag
tasks.description: If flag is true, return a deep users dashboard with counts, top, and lists. If flag is false, return a deep orders dashboard with counts, top, and lists.

tasks.title: Build an omni input dashboard
tasks.description: Return a record with stats, tops, pairs, and meta. stats contains nested users counts, nested orders counts, and matrix_size. tops contains user_name, city, country, and order_id. pairs contains active_name_city and paid_id_country, each as a list of two-item lists using the first three values. meta contains sorted profile_keys, clean_text from text lower-split-trim-joined by '|', and joined_words from words joined by '|'.

tasks.title: Build an all inputs report of reports
tasks.description: Return a record with primary and secondary. primary contains users and orders dashboards. primary.users contains counts, top, and lists. primary.orders contains counts, top, and lists. secondary contains pairs and meta. secondary.pairs contains name_order and city_country, each zipped from the first three active user values and first three paid order values. secondary.meta contains profile_keys, clean_text, joined_words, and matrix_size.

tasks.title: Choose an omni stack by flag
tasks.description: If flag is true, return a record with meta, matrix, and lists. meta contains sorted profile_keys, clean_text, and joined_words. matrix contains size. lists contains active_names and paid_ids, each taking the first three values. If flag is false, return a record with counts and tops. counts contains nested users and orders counts. tops contains user_name, city, country, and order_id.

tasks.title: Build a cross omni pairs dashboard
tasks.description: Return a record with cross, summary, and meta. cross contains name_order_pairs, city_country_pairs, and email_country_pairs, each zipped from the first three active user values and first three paid order values. email_country_pairs must normalize active user emails before zipping. summary contains active, paid, top_city, and top_country. meta contains clean_text and profile_keys.

tasks.title: Build a deep summary bundle
tasks.description: Return a record with dashboards and extras. dashboards contains users and orders. dashboards.users contains stats and top. dashboards.orders contains stats and top. extras contains pairs and meta. extras.pairs contains name_city and id_country using the first three values. extras.meta contains clean_text, joined_words, and matrix_size.

tasks.title: Count paid orders
tasks.description: Return the number of records in orders where paid is truthy.

tasks.title: Return profile city
tasks.description: Return the city value from profile.

tasks.title: Return the first three paid order countries
tasks.description: Filter to paid orders, preserve order, map country, and return the first three values.

tasks.title: Return the most frequent paid country
tasks.description: Filter to paid orders, group by country, count each group, and return the country with the highest count.

tasks.title: Normalize active user emails
tasks.description: Filter to active users and return their email values after trimming whitespace and converting to lowercase.

tasks.title: Zip paid order countries with ids
tasks.description: Filter to paid orders, take the first three country values and the first three id values, and return them as a zipped pair list.

tasks.title: Choose a meta or pairs stack by flag
tasks.description: If flag is true, return a record with meta and counts. meta contains profile_keys and clean_text. counts contains active and paid. If flag is false, return a record with pairs and top. pairs zips the first three active names with the first three paid order ids. top contains city and country.

tasks.title: Build a users orders meta split report
tasks.description: Return a record with users, orders, and meta. users contains top_name and active_cities. orders contains top_id and paid_countries. meta contains profile_keys and clean_text.

tasks.title: Build a name order top stack
tasks.description: Return a record with pairs, top, and counts. pairs zips the first three active user names with the first three paid order ids. top contains top_name and top_id. counts contains active and paid totals.

tasks.title: Build a report trident dashboard
tasks.description: Return a record with counts, pairs, and meta. counts contains nested users and orders counts. pairs contains name_order and city_country zipped from the first three active user values and the first three paid order values. meta contains profile_keys, clean_text, and joined_words.

tasks.title: Choose a report trident by flag
tasks.description: If flag is true, return counts, pairs, and meta as in a trident dashboard. If flag is false, return tops, lists, and matrix. tops contains top_name, top_id, top_city, and top_country. lists contains names, ids, and countries using the first three values. matrix contains size.

tasks.title: Build a super omni report stack
tasks.description: Return a record with primary, secondary, and summary. primary contains deep users and orders dashboards with counts, top, and lists. secondary contains pairs and meta. pairs contains name_order, city_country, and email_country zipped from the first three active user values and first three paid order values. meta contains profile_keys, clean_text, joined_words, and matrix_size. summary contains active, paid, top_team, and top_country.

tasks.title: Choose a super stack by flag
tasks.description: If flag is true, return a deep overview with users, orders, and meta. users contains counts, top, and lists. orders contains counts, top, and lists. meta contains profile_keys, clean_text, joined_words, and matrix_size. If flag is false, return a deep cross report with pairs, tops, and totals. pairs contains name_order, city_country, and email_country zipped from the first three values. tops contains user_name, order_id, city, and country. totals contains active and paid.

tasks.title: Build a hyper report of reports
tasks.description: Return a record with dashboards, cross, and final. dashboards.primary contains deep users and orders dashboards with counts and top. dashboards.secondary contains top_team, top_country, profile_keys, and clean_text. cross contains name_order, city_country, and email_country zipped from the first three values. final contains joined_words and matrix_size.

tasks.title: Build a tower meta cross dashboard
tasks.description: Return a record with layers, cross, and meta. layers.stats contains nested user counts, nested order counts, and matrix_size. layers.tops contains name, team, id, and country. layers.lists contains names, cities, ids, and countries using the first three values. cross contains name_country and email_id zipped from the first three active user values and the first three paid order values. meta contains profile_keys, clean_text, and joined_words.

tasks.title: Count open tickets
tasks.description: Return the number of tickets where open is truthy.

tasks.title: Return the most frequent error region
tasks.description: Filter logs to level error, group by region, count each group, and return the region with the highest count.

tasks.title: Return the top rated in-stock product sku
tasks.description: Filter products to in_stock and return the sku of the record with the highest rating.

tasks.title: Return the first three open ticket ids
tasks.description: Filter to open tickets, preserve input order, and return the first three id values.

tasks.title: Return sorted unique in-stock categories
tasks.description: Filter to in_stock products and return a sorted list of unique category values.

tasks.title: Pack open and closed ticket counts
tasks.description: Return a record with open and closed ticket counts.

tasks.title: Return sorted unique error log services
tasks.description: Filter logs to level error and return a sorted list of unique service values.

tasks.title: Build a product category count pack
tasks.description: Return a record with products and categories. products is the number of in_stock products. categories is a sorted list of unique in_stock categories.

tasks.title: Zip open ticket teams with cities
tasks.description: Filter to open tickets, take the first three team values and first three city values, and return them as a zipped pair list.

tasks.title: Choose ticket or product count by flag
tasks.description: If flag is true, return the number of open tickets. If flag is false, return the number of in_stock products.

tasks.title: Join in-stock product skus
tasks.description: Filter products to in_stock, map sku, take the first four values, and join them with '|'.

tasks.title: Build a log and ticket summary
tasks.description: Return a record with logs and tickets. logs contains errors and top_region. tickets contains open and top_city.

tasks.title: Choose inventory or incidents report
tasks.description: If flag is true, return products and tickets. products contains count and top_sku. tickets contains open and top_team. If flag is false, return logs and meta. logs contains errors and top_service. meta contains clean_text and profile_keys.

tasks.title: Build a product ticket meta report
tasks.description: Return a record with products, tickets, and meta. products contains top_sku and categories. tickets contains ids and cities. meta contains clean_text and profile_keys.

tasks.title: Build a log product pairs report
tasks.description: Return a record with pairs, top, and counts. pairs zips the first three error log services with the first three in_stock product skus. top contains region and category. counts contains errors and products.

tasks.title: Build an incident commerce dashboard
tasks.description: Return a record with incidents, inventory, and support. incidents contains errors and top_service. inventory contains in_stock and top_category. support contains open and top_team.

tasks.title: Choose an incident commerce stack
tasks.description: If flag is true, return incidents, inventory, and support. If flag is false, return pairs and meta. pairs contains service_sku and team_city using the first three values. meta contains clean_text, joined_words, and matrix_size.

tasks.title: Build a support commerce meta report
tasks.description: Return a record with support, commerce, and meta. support contains counts and lists for tickets. commerce contains counts and tops for products and logs. meta contains profile_keys and clean_text.

tasks.title: Build a grand operations report
tasks.description: Return a record with core, cross, and meta. core contains incidents, inventory, and support dashboards. cross contains service_sku, region_category, and team_city pairs using the first three values. meta contains clean_text, joined_words, and matrix_size.

tasks.title: Choose a grand operations stack
tasks.description: If flag is true, return core and meta. core contains incidents, inventory, and support dashboards with counts and tops. meta contains profile_keys, clean_text, joined_words, and matrix_size. If flag is false, return cross and summary. cross contains service_sku, region_category, and team_city pairs. summary contains errors, in_stock, and open.

tasks.title: Build a hyper mixed domain dashboard
tasks.description: Return a record with dashboards, cross, summary, and meta. dashboards contains incidents, inventory, and support with counts and tops. cross contains service_sku, region_category, and team_city pairs using the first three values. summary contains top_region, top_category, and top_team. meta contains profile_keys, clean_text, joined_words, and matrix_size.
